feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Issues with creating Signup page
entry.content: Hello everyone, I am trying to create a Signup page for my app, I followed closely some videos I saw on youtube as well as do some reading around, just to fix it but I dont seem to see where the problem is. I have been stuck and I believe assistance from anyone at this point might help. Thank you

entry.title: Using SAP Migrate to Modify or Upload Data in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Can SAP Migrate be utilized to modify or upload data directly into an SAP Build App?

If yes, I would appreciate guidance on:

  1. The process or steps required to integrate SAP Migrate with SAP Build Apps for data upload or modification.
  2. Supported data formats and any prerequisites for this integration.
  3. Any limitations or considerations when using SAP Migrate with SAP Build Apps.

If no, are there alternative tools or methods within the SAP ecosystem for handling such tasks effectively?

Thank you in advance for your insights and recommendations!

entry.title: Creating Roles and Managing Authorizations in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
I am working on SAP Build Apps and need some assistance with managing roles and authorizations effectively. Specifically, I have the following queries:

  1. How can I create a role with specific objects or actions in SAP Build Apps? For example, if I want to grant access to certain features or functionalities, what is the best approach to define such roles?

  2. What is the recommended way to configure and manage authorizations for these roles to ensure that users only access the features assigned to them?

  3. Are there specific tools or configurations in SAP Build or SAP BTP that I should use to streamline the process?

Any guidance, best practices, or relevant documentation links would be highly appreciated.

Looking forward to your support.

entry.title: RFC destination not showing up in destinations in Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi all, i created a RFC Destination in BTP cockpit, while checking the Connection ,it's showing as Connection Successful.

But this destination is not showing up in Build apps, under Integration Tab.
Not getting where i'm going wrong. Can anyone please help .
Thank you in Advance.

@Dan_Wroblewski  @DonWilliams @Sandra_Rossi @Ulrich_Schmidt

entry.title: attach documents
entry.content:
hello
I will explain my problem in brief
I work in a company where several people use a project in which they insert another subproject. My problem is that whenever someone uses the main project I can't attach the documents to my subproject. We use transaction CJ20N to create the subprojects and attach the documents. Is there any other transaction to which I can attach documents even when the main project is being processed by another user?

entry.title: Buil Workzone Trail POC
entry.content:
Hello Team,

i am leveraging the BTP trail account to get hands on SAP  Build WorkZone.

i trail BTP account ,i created a sub account and subscribed to "SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition"

when i try to access the application,it is navigating me to "Site Manager - Site Directory",i am expecting  landing page should take me to Admin Console.

could you please suggest,what is missing here to navigate to admin console

entry.title: sap build code authorization error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '$count')
entry.content:
I am working on a CAP (Cloud Application Programming) model where I have an entity called booksService.books, and I am applying role-based access control to filter certain fields based on user roles.

entity books {
key ID : UUID;
title : String;
author : String;
Sales : Integer;
Price : Integer;
} 

User Roles and Their Permissions:

  • AdminAll → Can see all data
  • viewExSales → Can see all fields except sales 

I initially wrote this event handler to modify the query when a user has the "viewExSales" role, so they cannot see the Sales column:

 

/**
 * 
 * @On(event = { "READ" }, entity = "booksService.books")
 * @Param {Object} request - User information, tenant-specific CDS model, headers, and query parameters
 */
module.exports = async function (request) {
    if (request.user.is('viewExSales')) {
        // Remove the 'Sales' column from the query
        request.query.columns = request.query.columns.filter(column => column !== 'Sales');
    }
};

 

 i get error

 

[cds] - ❗️Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '$count')
    at all (/home/user/projects/books/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/fiori/lean-draft.js:982:80)
    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
    at async cds.ApplicationService.handle (/home/user/projects/books/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/fiori/lean-draft.js:447:20)

 

So, I also tried implementing manual query filtering based on roles like this

 

module.exports = async function(request) {
    const { books } = cds.entities;
    const user = request.user;
    
    let columns = ['ID', 'title', 'author', 'Sales', 'Price'];

    if (user) {
        const userRoles = Array.isArray(user.roles) ? user.roles : Object.keys(user.roles);

        if (userRoles.includes('AdminAll')) {
            return await SELECT.from(books).columns(...columns);
        } 
        
        if (userRoles.includes('viewExSales')) {
            columns = columns.filter(col => col !== 'Sales');
        }

        return await SELECT.from(books).columns(...columns);
    } 

    return await SELECT.from(books).columns(...columns);
};

 

it works and returned the data correctly but there were issues in it

Issue:

  1. Filters and searches applied via the generated Fiori UI are ignored.
  • If I filter by title or author, the backend still returns the full dataset instead of the filtered results.
  • It seems like my custom query is overriding the default behavior of CAP filtering.

entry.title: SAP Desktop Agent is not running in unattended mode
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I have created an invoice extraction process using SAP Business Process Automation and installed SAP Desktop Agent version 3.24.X. I have also configured all necessary settings in SAP Build Process Automation Cockpit, including the environment setup and other required configurations.

The process runs as expected when tested in design mode. However, after deploying the release, I am facing the following issues:

  1. The application does not seem to execute in unattended mode in the Desktop Agent.
  2. The application is in running ... in monitor.
  3. The project is not deploying to the Desktop Agent.

I have attached screenshots of my configurations for your reference. Could you please assist in troubleshooting why the project is not deploying or executing properly in unattended mode?

entry.title: Issue with Using MAX Formula in SAP Build Apps - Only First Row Accessible
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing an issue when trying to use the MAX formula in SAP Build Apps. I want to get the maximum value from a specific column in my data variable. However, when I try to select a column, I can only choose it from the first row (e.g., data.App1[0].Qty) instead of selecting the entire column (e.g., data.App1[].Qty).

Expected behavior:

  • The MAX function should be able to evaluate the entire list of numeric values in a column.

Observed behavior:

  • The formula editor only allows selecting a column from the first row (data.App1[0].Qty), which does not provide the expected result for the whole dataset.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Is there a workaround or a correct way to reference an entire column in SAP Build Apps formulas?

entry.title: Restricting Input Box to Accept Only Numeric Data in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a Data Entity with a field where the data type is set to Number. Then, I created a Page Variable with the data type also set to Number.

I added an Input Box and bound it to the Page Variable. The data entered in the Input Box is supposed to be stored in the data entity field, which only accepts numeric values.

Issue:

Even though the data type is set to Number in both the Page Variable and the Data Entity field, the Input Box still allows the user to enter and save non-numeric values.

Question:

How can I restrict the Input Box to accept only numeric values and prevent the user from entering non-numeric characters?

entry.title: SAP Build, Joule studio , Beta function not visible on my Build account
entry.content:
Hello All, 

we have activated the paramter "Allow Beta Application/services" on our BTP sub account . 

but in Build we still cant see the option to create custom joule skills. 

http://discovery-center.cloud.sap/ai-feature/e93aa292-e7f4-449d-9586-f1a8510d5ab6/

Anyone knows how to get this BETA function in our Build ?

entry.title: SAP BTP Build Apps how to map attachements to SAP RAP ODATA Service
entry.content:
Dear SAP Build App Experts,

We would like to create a build component to attach a PDF document and map to a RAP Odata Service to S4 HANA could you please suggest how this can be achieved using BTP Build Apps

Thanks,

Vijaya

entry.title: SAP Build App Integration Issue with BTP Destination
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am facing an issue while integrating an SAP BTP destination with an SAP Build App. I have created a destination on SAP BTP and attempted to integrate it into my SAP Build App to fetch data entities. However, I encountered a "Connection Failed" error during the integration process.

Interestingly, when I review the data using SAP Build Code, I can see the entity details without any issues.

I suspect that the root cause of this issue is related to Additional Properties in the SAP BTP destination configuration, but I am not sure which properties need to be added or modified to resolve this issue.

Has anyone faced a similar issue? How can I resolve this connection failure in SAP Build App while the data is accessible in SAP Build Code?

entry.title: SAP Build Code application deployment error
entry.content:
Dear Community members,

I am trying to deploy application in build code and to see it in Work zone, can i get help to understand the below error on why my deployment is getting failed, i have signed in to my cloud foundry account as well

Appretiate your support

entry.title: HTTP Error 403 When Trying to Open Application in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

I am reaching out regarding an issue I'm facing with SAP Build Apps. Every time I attempt to open my application, I am encountering an HTTP Error 403, which prevents the application from loading. This error seems to occur consistently, regardless of the time or the device I am using.

Could you kindly investigate this issue and provide guidance on how to resolve it? I would appreciate any troubleshooting steps, or if there is a configuration that I may need to adjust in order to gain access.

Looking forward to your assistance.

 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: sap build apps authorization issue
entry.content:
hey hi,

im getting this error can u guys please look at this and guide me. Thanks in advance.

Access to
 30135459trial.design-time.us10.apps.build.cloud.sap was denied

You don't have authorization to view this page.

HTTP ERROR 403

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Issue - High Impact
entry.content:
Dear Members,

The Build Apps is now being giving issues from last week.

I was receiving the 403 error so I tried all possible approaches and there was no way to resolve it.

Currently, I deleted the sub account and tried to access the Build Apps with a new Sub Account.

The installation failed, stating unable to subscribe to the SaaS application.

When I opened it in the Subscriptions of the sub account, still it's in the free plan but failing to install the application. Below screenshots would help you to understand the issue in detail.

I had a demo in the coming week and lost everything at the moment. IT would be helpful if someone can provide me a good solution.

Thanks and Regards,

Ananthu RB

entry.title: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps. Try again.
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

I have tried multiple times however I am unable to subscribe to saas subscription. Please help. Error states below.

Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question to SAP Community.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Integration of Google reCAPTCHA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I was wondering if it could be possible to integrate reCAPTCHA protection (v3) in SAP Build Apps applications. I tought about hosting an index.html to be able to use the script, but if you have another idea, please make a discussion about it. Do you think it is possible anyway?

Best regards,

Gergő

entry.title: Issue with "Preview on Device" Progress in SAP Build Learning Path
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working through the SAP Build learning path, and I have successfully completed the "Preview on Device" step as instructed. However, my learning status remains at 80%, and this step is not marked as completed.

Since the next tasks are locked until this step is recognized as done, I am unable to proceed further. I have tried repeating the process multiple times, but the issue persists.

Has anyone else experienced this problem? Is there a way to manually mark the step as completed or refresh the progress?

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

Best regards, Mazen

SAP Build
